checks.detail: instruction.md, task.toml, environment/Dockerfile, and tests/test.sh all present.
solution/solve.sh, oracle.yaml, and job.yaml all present.
git and tmux installed via apt-get.
tests/ contains compute_reward.py in addition to test.sh; should live in environment/tests/.
reasons: tests/compute_reward.py should be moved to environment/tests/ and bundled into the Docker image via COPY

checks.detail: Stray job-local.yaml at task root is not a standard Harbor file.
reasons: job-local.yaml is non-standard; either remove it or document why it is needed alongside job.yaml

notes: Move tests/compute_reward.py to environment/tests/compute_reward.py and add a COPY directive in the Dockerfile so it is bundled into /tests at image build time.
Remove or rename job-local.yaml, or add a .gitignore entry if it is a local-only override.
